headline: Teledyne: Attractive Defense Backlog But Offset By Tepid Organic Guidance; Initiating At Hold

headline: Teledyne Recognizes 15 Years of Providing the U.S. Navy SEAL Delivery Vehicle Fleet
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 13, 2026--Teledyne Brown Engineering, Inc., a subsidiary of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) and a leader in advanced engineering and manufacturing solutions, proudly celebrates 15 years as the prime contractor for the MK 11 SEAL Delivery Vehicle (SDV) for U.S. Special Operations Command. Since the program’s inception, contract awards and modifications to Teledyne Brown Engineering for the MK 11 SDV design, development, production, spares, engineering su

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Challenges

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Teledyne Technologies, Raises Price Target to $603
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $600 to $603.
